$comment: Routing eval cases for scripts/run-evals.js. Routing hazards in this repo: the drupal-* guided skills vs the drupalorg-*-helper quick-help skills (doing vs explaining), the design trio (analyzer extracts specs, design-to-* generate code), and the pr-* trio. CI enforces a rank-1 floor (see .github/workflows/test.yml).

prompts.prompt: I've staged my changes — write the commit message
does this code follow Drupal coding standards? run phpcs on it
I wrote this service class but it has no tests yet — scaffold some
generate API documentation and a README for this module
what should QA test for this new checkout feature? build a test plan
which parts of the codebase are untested? find the coverage gaps
open a pull request for this branch
review my local changes before I submit the PR
prepare the release: changelog entries and the deployment checklist
I need to work on another ticket without losing my current work — set up a worktree
extract the colors, typography, and spacing specs from this Figma link
turn this Figma design into a WordPress block pattern
convert this mockup into a Drupal paragraph type
write the mobile-first SCSS for this component with proper breakpoints
test what you just built in a real browser at all three breakpoints
I fixed a bug in a contrib module — walk me through contributing it back to drupal.org
create a drupal.org issue for this bug in the webform module
push my fix as a merge request on git.drupalcode.org
clean up this Drupal codebase — unused modules and leftover config
how does the drupal.org issue fork and branch naming workflow go?
what's the right template and formatting for a drupal.org bug report?
props or slots for this single directory component? review my component.yml
install the WordPress development skills into this project
generate a composer patch for this contrib module fix and wire it into composer.json
